frontend.styling: Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui new-york + project tokens/theme
frontend.client-state: React hooks and small local state; SWR/api facades where used
frontend.contracts: Generated OpenAPI types from packages/contracts plus local zod validators for UI/runtime parsing
frontend.demo-mode: NEXT_PUBLIC_DEMO_MODE controls local demo payload fallbacks in lib/demo-mode.ts/lib/demo-data.ts. Production must set it false.
frontend.deploy: Standalone Node on VDS / preview-capable frontend deployment

backend.runtime: Python 3.12+, FastAPI, Uvicorn, Pydantic v2, pydantic-settings
backend.orm: SQLAlchemy 2.x async with typed Mapped/mapped_column models
backend.db: PostgreSQL 16 in prod; aiosqlite-compatible paths in tests where needed
backend.migrations: Alembic, with batch_alter_table where SQLite compatibility requires it
backend.queue: arq + Redis for worker/background tasks where enabled
backend.cache: PostgreSQL cache tables for payload/snapshot layers; Redis for queue/runtime cache where enabled
backend.observability: structlog/orjson/correlation/redaction canon where enabled by observability waves
backend.contracts: Pydantic schemas in apps/api/app/schemas/* are source of truth. TypeScript generated by scripts/contracts.

sidecar.name: SolarSage HTTP service
sidecar.parity: Golden fixtures under apps/solarsage/tests/fixtures with tolerance-based parity tests

llm.gateway: Vercel AI Gateway or direct provider via environment configuration
llm.rule: LLM writes narration only. It must not calculate chart facts, aspects, scores, dayStatus, or horary verdicts.

infra.orchestration: docker-compose for dev services; systemd units on VDS as needed
infra.agent-orchestration: Project-local GRACE adapter under grace/orchestrator/*; Prefect may execute but is not the source of truth
infra.ephemerides: /opt/sweph/ephe or configured sweph path for sidecar

boundary.contract: C-TODAY-PAYLOAD, C-CALENDAR-PAYLOAD, C-PROFILE-PAYLOAD, C-NATAL-PAYLOAD, C-HORARY, C-AUTH, C-ACCESS, C-CHECKIN, C-API-ERROR
boundary.rule: Frontend renders and collects user input. Backend owns astrology, access, credit spend, scoring, verdicts, and persistence.

Frontend imports payload types from packages/contracts barrel. It must not hand-author server payload shapes. Local zod schemas may exist for runtime validation/forms but must match Pydantic-generated contracts.
apps/api/app/schemas/* is the source of truth. scripts/contracts/export_openapi.py and pnpm contracts:generate update TS artifacts.
No raw SolarSage JSON, no internal scores, no private notes unless prompt_version explicitly allows it. LLM returns strict JSON only.
Backend is the only sidecar client. Sidecar never speaks to frontend or LLM directly.
SQLAlchemy 2.x async models and explicit services. No auto-REST. Ledger-like product state uses append/ledger semantics where required.

data-stores.store: Birth data, current location, birthday location, timezone fields.
One-question/one-credit spend ledger and idempotency backstop.
Horary question text/category/status, moment, place, request_hash, spent credit.
User evening feedback and closure state.

versions.version: Bump when client-facing payload shape changes incompatibly. Additive block types may rely on graceful-skip if frontend can safely ignore them.
Bump on scoring formula/status mapping change.
Bump on LLM prompt/model/narration policy changes.
Per-payload block schema version such as natal/v1 or horary blocks.

local-adaptations.adaptation: Pydantic schemas are API source of truth; TS contracts are generated. This replaces earlier TS-first drafts.
Frontend skips unknown block types safely, with dev diagnostics.
Horary quotas are ledger-based. The old HoraryQuota/questions_used/questions_limit model is forbidden.
For MVP, the default horary question place may come from profile current location. Browser/device geolocation is not required. User must still be able to change place manually.
Scoring knowledge is stored in versioned canon YAML, not hidden in implementation constants.
Local guidance: keep modules small; exceptions require explicit justification in review.

testing.technology: pytest + pytest-asyncio + httpx ASGITransport for backend unit/integration tests under apps/api/tests.
Playwright for browser E2E and visual regression where enabled.
OpenAPI export + pnpm contracts:generate/check to prevent Pydantic/TS drift.

banned.ban: Returning raw SolarSage or internal scoring data to the frontend.
Sending raw SolarSage, internal score fields, or private checkin notes to the LLM by default.
Letting the LLM calculate chart factors, aspects, dignity, dayStatus, or horary verdict.
Adding astrology interpretation or dayStatus computation in frontend code.
Adding scoring constants directly in Python/TypeScript instead of grace/canon/*.yml.
Adding new client-facing payload shapes in TypeScript before Pydantic schemas.
Using HoraryQuota/questions_used/questions_limit/left/nextInDays as the primary horary balance model.
Allowing horary submit without a usable question place/coordinates.
Encoding GRACE packet semantics only inside Prefect flow code; project truth remains in grace/orchestrator/*.
Using SQLModel for new models; SQLAlchemy 2.x async is the project canon.
